name: trocar_parametric_initial

frame.name: trocar
frame.origin: center of the visible/front aperture plane
frame.x_axis: arbitrary reference direction on the aperture plane
frame.y_axis: x_axis cross z_axis on the aperture plane
frame.z_axis: trocar bore axis pointing from the visible/front aperture into the tube

pose_estimation.note: Replace placeholder dimensions with caliper measurements before final experiments.

measurement_required: whether the visible rim is circular and planar
fixed holder geometry and pose relative to robot base
